author: celenity

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; child-src 'none'; connect-src 'none'; font-src 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; img-src 'none'; manifest-src 'none'; media-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; require-trusted-types-for 'script'; style-src 'none'; worker-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests;

description: Basic extension to support add-on installation from addons.thunderbird.net, without requiring the privileged mozAddonManager API
name: ATN-XPIHandler
